description:
Dogfood scenario for Ariadne parity work.

Project goal:
Build a minimal coding-agent product concept for AI builders, using external references attached to this project.

External references:
- https://github.com/SWE-agent/mini-swe-agent
- https://github.com/e10nMa2k/cc-mini

This is a read-only Multica downstream parity task. Do not edit files, do not commit, do not push, and do not create PRs.

Expected agent output:
1. Identify what the references imply about a minimal coding agent.
2. Propose the v0.1 architecture in plain terms.
3. Produce the first 3 build issues needed to implement it.
4. Call out blockers or missing project resources.

Acceptance criteria:
- The issue is assigned to a real Multica agent.
- Multica creates a task/run for the assignment.
- Agent activity is visible on the agent detail page.
- The issue receives either a useful agent response or a concrete blocker.
- Any blocker is visible enough to map back to Ariadne Inbox/Runtime behavior.
title: Define mini coding agent v0.1 from external references
